differential_diagnoses: Combined nutritional deficiency (B12, folate, and copper)
next_steps: Order serum retinol, beta-carotene, and retinol-binding protein levels
Initiate high-dose oral vitamin A supplementation
Obtain complete blood count, serum B12, folate, copper, zinc, and vitamin D levels
Consult pediatric nutrition for structured feeding assessment and caloric/micronutrient supplementation
Consult ophthalmology for formal assessment of xerophthalmia, including evaluation for Bitot spots
